title: U.K. cyberspying chief says the West is between peace and war as Russia ramps up hybrid attacks
description: BLETCHLEY, England — Artificial intelligence is “an unstoppable force” that is being weaponized in ways that fall just short of traditional warfare, Britain’s cyberspying chief warned Wednesday. title: Steele: Thoughts on the source of human magnificence
description: One could be forgiven for thinking that “Magnifica Humanitas” (Magnificent Humanity), the new encyclical released by Pope Leo XIV, is yet another trendy assault on artificial intelligence.

title: Stock Index Futures Climb on AI Optimism and Lower Bond Yields, Fed Speak and Marvell Earnings on Tap
description: June S&P 500 E-Mini futures (ESM26) are up +0.36%, and June Nasdaq 100 E-Mini futures (NQM26) are up +0.56% this morning as optimism surrounding artificial intelligence and lower bond yields boosted sentiment.
content:
June S&P 500 E-Mini futures (ESM26) are up +0.36%, and June Nasdaq 100 E-Mini futures (NQM26) are up +0.56% this morning as optimism surrounding artificial intelligence and lower bond yields boosted sentiment.

title: Indian boards that blithely embrace fads should weigh the legal liability risks of reckless AI adoption
description: Indian companies have been swept up by global hype around artificial intelligence (AI). But all directors and officers need to ask their insurers about what AI-related risks their D&O insurance policies refuse to cover—and why. Some of that buzz needs legal moderation.
content: The most troublesome presence at a board meeting once used to be that of an activist investor. Then came the issue of cybersecurity. Then ESG. And now, marching confidently into the boardroom with the swagger of a management consultant and the unpred... [890 chars]

title: India stocks set for first yearly drop in over a decade as foreign investors leave: Reuters poll
description: Indian stocks are set for their first annual decline in more than a decade, a Reuters poll of equity ​analysts found, as an exodus of foreign investors and limited exposure to an artificial intelligence (AI) boom batter what was Asia's most ‌attractive market.

title: CBRI for disaster risk reduction, AI technologies

title: AI is massively increasing China’s new weapon development speed: scientists
description: Humble rolling bearing now a focal point for country’s defence industry as it experiments with artificial intelligence to gain edge over US.
content:
A study published last month in the Chinese defence engineering journal Acta Armamentarii described how researchers developed an AI-powered “bearing design agent” – capable of autonomously designing rolling bearings in advanced machinery.

title: Booing students and cost blowouts show the AI honeymoon is over
description: Artificial intelligence has been billed as the answer to every productivity problem. But in the face of rising costs, some tech leaders are changing their tune.

title: What the Pope Said About A.I.
description: Jill Lepore on Pope Leo XIV’s encyclical “Magnifica Humanitas,” on the risks of artificial intelligence.
